'''payozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qtr|qtr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qtr|qtr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| payozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæyezheth|pæyezheth]] || [[word:pæyezhej|pæyezhej]] || [[word:pæyezhesh|pæyezhesh]] || [[word:pæyezhe|pæyezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:payoyozhoth|payoyozhoth]] || [[word:payoyozhoj|payoyozhoj]] || [[word:payoyozhosh|payoyozhosh]] || [[word:payoyozho|payoyozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:payozhoth|payozhoth]] || [[word:payozhoj|payozhoj]] || [[word:payozhosh|payozhosh]] || [[word:payozho|payozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:payofzhoth|payofzhoth]] || [[word:payofzhoj|payofzhoj]] || [[word:payofzhosh|payofzhosh]] || [[word:payofzhof|payofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:payozhotho|payozhotho]] || [[word:payozhojo|payozhojo]] || [[word:payozhosho|payozhosho]] || [[word:payozhoko|payozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:payozhoth|payozhoth]] || [[word:payozhoj|payozhoj]] || [[word:payozhosh|payozhosh]] || [[word:payozho|payozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:payozhothol|payozhothol]] || [[word:payozhojol|payozhojol]] || [[word:payozhoshol|payozhoshol]] || [[word:payozhokol|payozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:payozhothotho|payozhothotho]] || [[word:payozhojojo|payozhojojo]] || [[word:payozhoshosho|payozhoshosho]] || [[word:payozhoko|payozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:payozhothon|payozhothon]] || [[word:payozhojon|payozhojon]] || [[word:payozhoshon|payozhoshon]] || [[word:payozhokon|payozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:payozhothoro|payozhothoro]] || [[word:payozhojoro|payozhojoro]] || [[word:payozhoshoro|payozhoshoro]] || [[word:payozhokoro|payozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
